Bash(cd "/mnt/c/Users/SajcS/Desktop/spiral steward website/" && python3 << 'EOF'
# Clean up the path_sagent text \(remove PDF spacing artifacts\)
with open\('/tmp/path_sagent.txt', 'r'\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)

# The PDF extracted with spaces between chars - join words together
import re
# Split by multiple spaces or newlines, join short fragments
lines = [l.strip\(\) for l in raw.splitlines\(\) if l.strip\(\)]
cleaned = ' '.join\(lines\)
# Fix multiple spaces
cleaned = re.sub\(r'  +', ' ', cleaned\)
print\(cleaned[:5000]\)
EOF)
